'''Point Modie''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Maramere]]. In it was the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] The [[Silver Cloud]]. The people of this city were also the victims of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]]'s ([[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]]) [[Trihexalon]] test.

{{City-stub}}
